sentences.target: Der Arzt will mein Knie untersuchen.

translations.de: Der Arzt will mein Knie untersuchen.
translations.en: The doctor wants to examine my knee.
translations.es: El médico quiere examinarme la rodilla.
translations.fr: Le médecin veut examiner mon genou.
translations.it: Il medico vuole visitarmi il ginocchio.
translations.pt: O médico quer examinar meu joelho.
translations.he: הרופא רוצה לבדוק לי את הברך.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ muốn khám đầu gối của tôi.
translations.nl: De dokter wil mijn knie onderzoeken.
translations.hu: Az orvos meg akarja vizsgálni a térdemet.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मेरा घुटना जांचना चाहता है.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός θέλει να εξετάσει το γόνατό μου.
translations.ro: Medicul vrea să îmi examineze genunchiul.
translations.ja: 医者が私の膝を診たいと言っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; agrees with 'Arzt' as subject.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); selects bare infinitive 'untersuchen' to express volition.
Possessive determiner; neuter accusative singular form; modifies 'Knie' and marks the possessor as the speaker.
Common noun; neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'untersuchen' within the infinitival complement.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive; head of the VP complement selected by the modal 'will'. Inseparable prefix verb (not split here).

sentences.target: Die Polizei muss den Unfall untersuchen.

translations.de: Die Polizei muss den Unfall untersuchen.
translations.en: The police have to investigate the accident.
translations.es: La policía tiene que investigar el accidente.
translations.fr: La police doit enquêter sur l’accident.
translations.zh-Hans: 警察必须调查这起事故。
translations.pt: A polícia precisa investigar o acidente.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát phải điều tra vụ tai nạn.
translations.ar: يجب على الشرطة التحقيق في الحادث.
translations.nl: De politie moet het ongeluk onderzoeken.
translations.hu: A rendőrségnek ki kell vizsgálnia a balesetet.
translations.hi: पुलिस को दुर्घटना की जांच करनी है.
translations.el: Η αστυνομία πρέπει να ερευνήσει το ατύχημα.
translations.ja: 警察はその事故を調査しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; agrees with 'Polizei' as subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); selects bare infinitive 'untersuchen' to express obligation/necessity.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; modifies 'Unfall' as the object.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'untersuchen' within the infinitival complement.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive; head of the VP complement selected by the modal 'muss'. Inseparable prefix verb.

translations.fr: Je fais vérifier mon ordinateur portable.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把笔记本电脑拿去检查。
translations.yue: 我攞部手提電腦去檢查。
translations.he: אני שולח את המחשב הנייד לבדיקה.
translations.vi: Tôi mang laptop đi kiểm tra.
translations.hi: मैं लैपटॉप की जाँच करवा रहा हूँ.
translations.sv: Jag lämnar in datorn för kontroll.
translations.ja: ノートパソコンを点検してもらっています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present) in causative use; selects a bare infinitive ('untersuchen') and an object ('den Laptop') that is the patient of the embedded verb.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; modifies 'Laptop' as the object.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; semantic patient of 'untersuchen' within the causative construction.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive; complement of 'lasse' in a causative construction. Inseparable prefix verb.

sentences.target: Die Ärztin möchte meinen Rücken untersuchen.

translations.de: Die Ärztin möchte meinen Rücken untersuchen.
translations.en: The doctor would like to examine my back.
translations.es: La doctora quiere examinarme la espalda.
translations.fr: Le médecin voudrait examiner mon dos.
translations.it: La dottoressa vorrebbe visitarmi la schiena.
translations.ko: 여의사가 제 등을 진찰하고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 女医生想检查我的背部。
translations.yue: 女醫生想檢查我個背脊。
translations.ru: Врач хотела бы осмотреть мою спину.
translations.pt: A médica gostaria de examinar minhas costas.
translations.he: הרופאה רוצה לבדוק לי את הגב.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ muốn khám lưng cho tôi.
translations.nl: De arts wil mijn rug onderzoeken.
translations.hu: A doktornő meg szeretné vizsgálni a hátamat.
translations.hi: महिला डॉक्टर मेरी पीठ की जांच करना चाहती है.
translations.el: Η γιατρός θέλει να εξετάσει την πλάτη μου.
translations.ro: Medicul vrea să îmi examineze spatele.
translations.ja: 医者が私の背中を診たいと言っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; agrees with 'Ärztin' as subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present subjunctive form used for polite desire); selects bare infinitive 'untersuchen'.
Possessive determiner; accusative singular masculine form; modifies 'Rücken' and marks the possessor as the speaker.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'untersuchen' within the infinitival complement.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive; head of the VP complement selected by the modal 'möchte'. Inseparable prefix verb.
